1.translation: All praise and thanks is for Allah The Master of all nations and people
The extremely loving and caring right now, the always loving and caring
The Owner and The King of the day of judgment
You alone we worship and You alone we ask for help
Guide us to the straight path
The path of those whom You have favored
Not the path of those who have wrath upon them nor of those who are lost

2.arabic: ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْكِتَـٰبُ لَا رَيْبَ ۛ فِيهِ ۛ هُدًۭى لِّلْمُتَّقِينَ
2.translation: That is the book! No doubt! In it is a guidance for the cautious
